summary: A clip from a KHOU 11 News segment. It shows a map graphic marking a HOMICIDE SCENE near a highway interchange, footage of a Harris County Sheriff crime-scene truck parked behind yellow crime-scene tape in a residential area in the rain, and a reporter holding a KHOU 11 microphone interviewing a man in a tie.

script.scene: A map graphic marks a HOMICIDE SCENE near a highway interchange.
Footage shows a Harris County Sheriff crime-scene truck parked behind yellow crime-scene tape in a residential area.
A reporter holding a KHOU 11 microphone interviews a man in a tie.
